## AI Media Buyer By Creatify

Launching today

Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily. [...] Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily.

Every media buyer knows the ritual: five dashboards, three hours of reports, still guessing what to do next. Creatify AI Media Buyer connects to your Meta, Google, AppLovin and TikTok ad accounts and does what a human buyer does audits campaigns, finds spend that's quietly bleeding, spots what's scaling, and acts on it. It generates new creatives from your actual winners and launches them, all through chat. And it remembers your account history, so its recommendations compound over time.

## PreviousCreatifyLaunches

Creatify Product Video

Creatify Product VideoROAS-focused AI product video builder

Launched on May 5th, 2025 [...] What impressed me most about AI Media Buyer is that it goes far beyond dashboards. It helps turn data into actionable decisions. From performance analysis and strategy recommendations to creative generation and optimization, it feels like a true AI co-worker rather than just another AI tool.

I’ve been fortunate to see this product evolve from the early days, helping refine the ads strategies behind it. Today, the quality of its recommendations is genuinely impressive, and it’s already become part of our internal workflow.

I truly believe AI Media Buyer is changing how paid advertising gets done. The future isn’t AI replacing marketers—it’s AI and marketers making better decisions together.

Huge congratulations to the Creatify team on the launch! 🚀

# Creatify Reviews

### The community submitted 28 reviews to tell us what they like about Creatify, what Creatify can do better, and more.

Based on 28 reviews

Review Creatify? [...] Based on 28 reviews

Review Creatify?

Reviewers are split on Creatify. Supporters say it is easy to learn, fast at turning a product link or prompt into usable ad videos, and strong on avatars, templates, visual quality, and support; some also like using it for product scenes and campaign variations. The main product complaints are limited fine-grained editing, uneven voice realism, lip-sync, output consistency, and weak non-English voiceovers. The sharpest criticism is about billing and refunds: many unhappy users describe confusing renewals, denied refunds, and poor support, which often outweighs their mixed views on video quality.

results.title: AdCreative.ai Reviews (2026)
results.content:
Report

•1 review

Very promising tool! The ability to generate both videos and visuals while staying aligned with our brand guidelines, all within a single platform, is a major advantage. It allows everything to be managed within the same ecosystem, which is a real time-saver. The "stock video" feature was especially helpful: I was able to animate a static image that followed a very specific client brief (including safety shoes and branded helmets). I then created several variations of the animated version and turned them into ads to test different text combinations. I definitely recommend it! It’s not perfect yet, but the tool keeps improving day by day.

Based on 53 reviews

Review AdCreative.ai? [...] Report

 6 views

•1 review

Using AdCreative has done wonders for my career. I’m a freelancer who has a severe physical disability and being able to use Artificial Intelligence to design ads for clients is lifesaving. I found it was very simple to get started with AdCreative and I quickly became adept, which helped me improve my profitability. Out of all the marketing tools I've tried in my time, AdCreative is definitely the one that I’ve benefited from the most. Disabilities can often be limiting when it comes to computer use, for instance with typing. This has allowed me to spend less time working. I’d encourage anyone to try the free trial to see if this helps them. You really can’t go wrong!
